lakeformation.resource.CfnAbout: The `AWS::LakeFormation::Resource` represents the data (Amazon S3 buckets and folders) that is being registered with AWS Lake Formation. When a `Resource` type CloudFormation template is uploaded, an AWS Lake Formation [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lake-formation/latest/dg/aws-lake-formation-api-credential-vending.html

lakeformation.resource.ResourceArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource.

lakeformation.resource.RoleArn.Description: The IAM role that registered a resource.

lakeformation.resource.UseServiceLinkedR.Description: Designates a trusted caller, an IAM principal, by registering this caller with the Data Catalog.
